---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something the SDK should support
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that the SDK doesn't currently support?

**Proposed API or behavior**
A rough sketch of what you'd want — Swift signature, behavior, etc.

**Why this fits R10Kit (vs. consumer-app code)**
Pure protocol / transport / device-state work fits the SDK.
Visualization, persistence, networking, ballistics simulation do
not — those belong in apps that consume the SDK.

**References**
Relevant proto fields from `mholow/gsp-r10-adapter`, prior issues,
etc.
